{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Soulfire control
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses [[soulfire]] control to guide the air around him.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
